TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Don Barksdale == kawas tay 1923 , ryax sa tay 31 nqu tay 3, Don Barksdale, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 1993) qnxan nya(qyanux nya) Barksdale htgan na ryax maki cyalipuniya awk'lang.Don Barksdale ga panga usuw qaya na squliq mtzyaw beh po'man.cyux maki lingay polihng pqwansan biru mqbaq biru. Barksdale ga mqbaq mari na p'unro maki koyeng. aring 1941 kawas tehok 1943 kawas cyux maki maling pqwasan biru mqwas ru myugi,tmasot mqwas ru myugi magal blaq balay na pqwasan biru pira. pincyuwagan nya' ryax qnxan nqu Don Barksdale sa senmung pgnawgan mari'. NBA 1951 kawas hiya ru Baltimore Bullets ÁįĹ biru qutux wagiq biru. Nathaniel Clifton Chuck Cooper ,Earl Lloyd ru Hank DeZonie ,1950 kawas tmwang lanmo lga,te qutux mzyu mari maki NBA na ťĚěŤ£Ē Amerika squilq.suruw lga,Barksdale musa Boston Celtics ,sazing kawas,hiya Kakao ŚŹóŚā∑ pincyogan nya mhngaw la. Later years masoq qnxan na mzyu mari lga,musa mise na renki cyux maki kosi nya ru gyahan sazing lahuy na mhngan maki Oakland . Olympic Games kingpay na tkura' mari' na mmlikuy sa kawas tay (1948) na Olympic Games. 28 kawas tmwang NBA. mhuqil 1993 kawas 3 byacing 8 ryax,magal nbu wal mhuqil la maki Oakland,California 69 kawas nya. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: == *on ő≤arks~…ē*ale == kawas~…ē taj **** , rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj *, *on ő≤arks~…ē*ale, s~…ēquliq na p Ēunro. (mńßuqil s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) qnxan nja(qjanux nja) ő≤arks~…ē*ale ńßt…£an na rjax maki ¶~ ®jalipunija awk ĒlaŇč.*on ő≤arks~…ē*ale …£a paŇča us~…ēuw qaja na s~…ēquliq mtzjaw ő≤eńß po Ēman. ¶~ ®jux maki liŇčaj polińßŇč pqwans~…ēan ő≤iru mqő≤aq ő≤iru. ő≤arks~…ē*ale …£a mqő≤aq mari na p Ēunro maki kojeŇč. ariŇč **** kawas~…ē teńßok **** kawas~…ē ¶~ ®jux maki maliŇč pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru mqwas~…ē ru mju…£i,tmas~…ēot mqwas~…ē ru mju…£i ma…£al ő≤laq ő≤alaj na pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru pira. pin ¶~ ®juwa…£an nja Ē rjax qnxan nqu *on ő≤arks~…ē*ale s~…ēa s~…ēenmuŇč p…£naw…£an mari Ē. nő≤a **** kawas~…ē ńßija ru ő≤altimore ő≤ullets~…ē * ő≤iru qutux wa…£iq ő≤iru. natńßaniel ¶~ ®li*ton ¶~ ®ńßu ¶~ ®k ¶~ ®ooper ,earl lloj* ru ńßank *ezonie ,**** kawas~…ē tmwaŇč lanmo l…£a,te qutux mzju mari maki nő≤a na ** amerika s~…ēquilq.s~…ēuruw l…£a,ő≤arks~…ē*ale mus~…ēa ő≤os~…ēton ¶~ ®elti ¶~ ®s~…ē ,s~…ēaziŇč kawas~…ē,ńßija kakao ** pin ¶~ ®jo…£an nja mńßŇčaw la. later jears~…ē mas~…ēoq qnxan na mzju mari l…£a,mus~…ēa mis~…ēe na renki ¶~ ®jux maki kos~…ēi nja ru …£jańßan s~…ēaziŇč lańßuj na mńßŇčan maki oaklan* . oljmpi ¶~ ® …£ames~…ē kiŇčpaj na tkura Ē mari Ē na mmlikuj s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj (****) na oljmpi ¶~ ® …£ames~…ē. ** kawas~…ē tmwaŇč nő≤a. mńßuqil **** kawas~…ē * ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč * rjax,ma…£al nő≤u wal mńßuqil la maki oaklan*, ¶~ ®ali*ornia ** kawas~…ē nja. pin ¶~ ®juwa…£an nja Ē ps~…ēpŇčan mari s~…ēa maj ju…£al ja ¶~ ®iŇč mas~…ēuq ms~…ēpuŇč mari s~…ēa ps~…ēpŇčan mari na maj ¶~ ®ju…£al ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč l…£a ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* national ő≤as~…ēkető≤all as~…ēs~…ēo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ē
S.FORM: == Don Barksdale == kawas tay 1923 , ryax sa tay 31 nqu tay 3, Don Barksdale, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 1993) qnxan nya(qyanux nya) Barksdale htgan na ryax maki cyalipuniya awk'lang.Don Barksdale ga panga usuw qaya na squliq mtzyaw beh po'man.cyux maki lingay polihng pqwansan biru mqbaq biru. Barksdale ga mqbaq mari na p'unro maki koyeng. aring 1941 kawas tehok 1943 kawas cyux maki maling pqwasan biru mqwas ru myugi,tmasot mqwas ru myugi magal blaq balay na pqwasan biru pira. pincyuwagan nya' ryax qnxan nqu Don Barksdale sa senmung pgnawgan mari'. NBA 1951 kawas hiya ru Baltimore Bullets ÁįĹ biru qutux wagiq biru. Nathaniel Clifton Chuck Cooper ,Earl Lloyd ru Hank DeZonie ,1950 kawas tmwang lanmo lga,te qutux mzyu mari maki NBA na ťĚěŤ£Ē Amerika squilq.suruw lga,Barksdale musa Boston Celtics ,sazing kawas,hiya Kakao ŚŹóŚā∑ pincyogan nya mhngaw la. Later years masoq qnxan na mzyu mari lga,musa mise na renki cyux maki kosi nya ru gyahan sazing lahuy na mhngan maki Oakland . Olympic Games kingpay na tkura' mari' na mmlikuy sa kawas tay (1948) na Olympic Games. 28 kawas tmwang NBA. mhuqil 1993 kawas 3 byacing 8 ryax,magal nbu wal mhuqil la maki Oakland,California 69 kawas nya. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: == *on ő≤arks~…ē*ale == kawas~…ē taj **** , rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj *, *on ő≤arks~…ē*ale, s~…ēquliq na p Ēunro. (mńßuqil s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) qnxan nja(qjanux nja) ő≤arks~…ē*ale ńßt…£an na rjax maki ¶~ ®jalipunija awk ĒlaŇč.*on ő≤arks~…ē*ale …£a paŇča us~…ēuw qaja na s~…ēquliq mtzjaw ő≤eńß po Ēman. ¶~ ®jux maki liŇčaj polińßŇč pqwans~…ēan ő≤iru mqő≤aq ő≤iru. ő≤arks~…ē*ale …£a mqő≤aq mari na p Ēunro maki kojeŇč. ariŇč **** kawas~…ē teńßok **** kawas~…ē ¶~ ®jux maki maliŇč pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru mqwas~…ē ru mju…£i,tmas~…ēot mqwas~…ē ru mju…£i ma…£al ő≤laq ő≤alaj na pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru pira. pin ¶~ ®juwa…£an nja Ē rjax qnxan nqu *on ő≤arks~…ē*ale s~…ēa s~…ēenmuŇč p…£naw…£an mari Ē. nő≤a **** kawas~…ē ńßija ru ő≤altimore ő≤ullets~…ē * ő≤iru qutux wa…£iq ő≤iru. natńßaniel ¶~ ®li*ton ¶~ ®ńßu ¶~ ®k ¶~ ®ooper ,earl lloj* ru ńßank *ezonie ,**** kawas~…ē tmwaŇč lanmo l…£a,te qutux mzju mari maki nő≤a na ** amerika s~…ēquilq.s~…ēuruw l…£a,ő≤arks~…ē*ale mus~…ēa ő≤os~…ēton ¶~ ®elti ¶~ ®s~…ē ,s~…ēaziŇč kawas~…ē,ńßija kakao ** pin ¶~ ®jo…£an nja mńßŇčaw la. later jears~…ē mas~…ēoq qnxan na mzju mari l…£a,mus~…ēa mis~…ēe na renki ¶~ ®jux maki kos~…ēi nja ru …£jańßan s~…ēaziŇč lańßuj na mńßŇčan maki oaklan* . oljmpi ¶~ ® …£ames~…ē kiŇčpaj na tkura Ē mari Ē na mmlikuj s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj (****) na oljmpi ¶~ ® …£ames~…ē. ** kawas~…ē tmwaŇč nő≤a. mńßuqil **** kawas~…ē * ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč * rjax,ma…£al nő≤u wal mńßuqil la maki oaklan*, ¶~ ®ali*ornia ** kawas~…ē nja. pin ¶~ ®juwa…£an nja Ē ps~…ēpŇčan mari s~…ēa maj ju…£al ja ¶~ ®iŇč mas~…ēuq ms~…ēpuŇč mari s~…ēa ps~…ēpŇčan mari na maj ¶~ ®ju…£al ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč l…£a ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* national ő≤as~…ēkető≤all as~…ēs~…ēo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ē
